LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF KEVIN ROSENBAUM'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO ENTER JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE:JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA T. PAXTON, CSR #1558

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSENBAUM, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, RICHARD LEE $40,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $14,496.60 INTEREST, $397.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $59,544.20, SEE SCANNED DOC
